settings.subtitle: Handcrafted pieces, made slowly and worn beautifully.

settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading:
Made slowly.
Worn beautifully.
settings.body: Buranshh is named after the Buransh wildflower — bold, crimson-bloomed, mountain-born. Every piece we make carries that same quiet confidence: rooted in Himalayan craft, designed for the woman who moves through her life with intention.

settings.text: Hand-stitched with care. Worn at the centre of your life.
Rooted in craft. Ready for wherever you are.

settings.quote: "A clothing brand that captures the blend of nature-inspired handmade pieces with modern and expressive slow fashion."

settings.title: Hand-stitched
settings.body: Every piece made by skilled artisans, stitch by careful stitch. No shortcuts, no compromises.

settings.title: Naturally Sourced
settings.body: Fabrics and dyes drawn from natural origins. Earthy, breathable, and built for real life.

settings.title: Made to Last
settings.body: Quality implied, never shouted. Garments designed to outlast trends and grow with you.

settings.title: With Intention
settings.body: Slow fashion for every day. Pieces you reach for without thinking, season after season.

settings.label: Stay close
settings.heading:
Wear it before
the world knows about it.
settings.body: Early access to new collections. Behind-the-craft stories. The occasional quiet note from us.

settings.brand_body: Slow fashion for women. Rooted in Himalayan craft, designed for everyday life.
